reviews.comment:
Hace un mes con el verso que está caído el sistema y solo aceptan efectivo. La primera los banque pero ahora otra vez, y te dicen “sí desde el 1ro de diciembre no tenemos sistema” se creen que uno come vidrio? Es para no computar los descuentos serviclub

(Translated by Google)
It's been a month since they told me the system was down and they only accept cash. The first time I put up with it, but now it's happening again, and they say, "Yes, we haven't had a system since December 1st." Do they think we're stupid? It's so they don't apply the Serviclub discounts.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCb3QyT1pnEAE

The day we went to fill up with fuel, a rude man with no desire to work left me without fuel and with very poor service.
